MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GROHE AG's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS and complaint is off calendar. Plaintiff Mid-Century Insurance Company has acknowledged that its previous service on Grohe AG by registered mail is ineffective and it is in the process of effecting service properly. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
